citation_label: Value Added Tax (Rate of Tax) Order, 2006 — 18% standard rate
heading: Value Added Tax (Rate of Tax) Order, 2006 — 18% standard rate

metadata.source_authority: Republic of Uganda (statutory instrument under s.78 of the VAT Act), reproduced by the Parliament of Uganda
metadata.source_note: The Value Added Tax (Rate of Tax) Order, 2006 as carried in the Parliament of Uganda's hosted Reproduction of the Income Tax Act Cap. 340 and Value Added Tax Cap. 349 (2014 compilation, page 256; digital text layer). Made under section 78 of the VAT Act; commenced 1 July 2005; sets the 18% standard rate on taxable supplies, non-exempt imports and imported services. The rate is unchanged through FY2025/26.
metadata.title: Value Added Tax (Rate of Tax) Order, 2006 — 18% standard rate

body: SI No.51 of 2005 and No.29 of 2006 (Under Section 78 of the Value Added Tax Act, Cap.349) IN EXERCISE of the powers conferred upon the Minister by Section 78 of the Value Added Tax Act, this Order is made this 15th day of June 2006. 1. Title This Order may be cited as the Value Added Tax (rate of Tax) Order 2006. 2. Commencement This Order shall come into force on the 1st day of July 2005. 3. Rate of Tax The rate of tax for – (a) every taxable supply made in Uganda by a taxable person; (b) every import of goods other than an exempt import; and (c) the supply of any imported services by any person, is 18% of the taxable value as defined in Sections 21 and 23 of the VAT Act. 4. The rate of tax prescribed in paragraph 3 does not apply to taxable supplies specified in the Third Schedule of the Act.[i.e. Zero-rated goods and services] _____________________
citation_label: Value Added Tax (Rate of Tax) Order, 2006 — 18% standard rate 1
heading: rate-of-tax-order-2006
